data.notes: For 24 x 7 support, please contact our Customer Assistance Center at cac@telehouse.com. For technical inquiries, please contact at iixeng@telehouse.com

data.name: Hong Kong Internet eXchange Limited
data.notes:
1) HKIX has TWO Core Sites, FIVE Satellite Sites and ONE Reseller Site for the facilities. Participants can connect HKIX directly via local loop circuits to the Core Sites or fiber cross connects to the Satellite Sites or Reseller Sites within the same Data Centre.

Core Sites: 
- CUHK (HKIX1b) and CDX (HKIX1c)

Satellite Sites: 
- CITIC Telecom @Kwai Chung (HKIX2); 
- iAdvantage @MEGA Two (HKIX3) and @MEGA-i (HKIX3b);
- NTT @FDC (HKIX4);
- KDDI @HKCOLO / Telehouse (HKIX5)

Reseller Sites:
- CommVerge @HK2 (HKIX6)

Please visit https://www.hkix.net/hkix/satellite-sites.htm or https://www.hkix.net/hkix/Resellers.htm for more about our satellite sites and reseller sites in details.

2) ALL HKIX sites are on the same Peering LAN (123.255.88.0/21), you can do Multi-lateral Peering (MPLA) with the route servers and Bi-lateral Peering (BLPA) over the HKIX layer 2 network. 

For details, please visit https://www.hkix.net/hkix/route-server.htm

data.name: Proact IT Group AB
data.notes:
Proact is Europe’s leading independent data centre and cloud services provider. 

We are present in most European countries, and we do run our own Internet Exchange in Nuremberg, Germany.

data.name: LCL Belgium
data.notes:
The reference for data centers in Belgium. 
LCL provides retail colocation and hyperscale space. We have the best connected data centers in Belgium. Internet exchanges are part of our eco-system of connectivity. Direct cloud connections are available by using ECX fabric. 
LCL is proud to be carrier and cloud neutral.

data.name: Atom86 B.V.
data.notes:
atom86 builds, designs, and manages infrastructures where fast, reliable, and high-quality connectivity is mission critical. Resolving customer connectivity issues and optimizing their infrastructure is atom’s biggest motivation; to make sure their customers are connected and stay connected. 

atom86 provides mission critical internet, cloud and DCI (Data Center Interconnect) connections.
